query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS autoCloseLog (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  accountId VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  accountNumber VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  symbol VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  optionSymbol VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  optionType VARCHAR(4) NOT NULL,
  strike VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  expiration VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  quantity INT NOT NULL,
  openPrice VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  closePrice VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  profitPct VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  targetPct INT NOT NULL,
  closeReason VARCHAR(20) NULL,
  closedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  archived BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  archivedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  closedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
